sub_goals.description: localStorage adapter with load/save/clear and STORAGE_KEY.
sub_goals.verification_notes: S2.A1: load returns null on absent or corrupt JSON (try/catch + isValidBoardState). S2.A2: save serializes via JSON.stringify under STORAGE_KEY. S2.A3: clear() removes the key. S2.A5: corrupt JSON caught and returns null.
